value.text: 2026-06-10 daily auto-release (scheduled run 27258655654, 06:50Z) FAILED at sentry-telemetry-gate: PM-CLI-1J 'CommandError: {' — a CommandError whose message was the raw guided-error JSON envelope (code tracker_not_initialized) thrown by an ephemeral temp-dir script (readPmItemsForUpsert, source no longer on disk; 2 events 2026-06-09T21:34Z). Gate classifier fix already landed in PR #197 (fba75fb0, merged 11:34Z, adds 'tracker_not_initialized' to KNOWN_EXPECTED_HANDLED_CLI_ISSUE_PATTERNS) but AFTER the scheduled run. Recovery: resolved PM-CLI-1J in Sentry + re-dispatched auto-release.yml with push=true (run 27284359777). Will verify v2026.6.10 npm publish before closing.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-04 release-health verified live: git tag v2026.7.4 exists and npm view @unbrained/pm-cli version = 2026.7.4 (latest advanced). Today's merges to main (PR #428 head + close-message fallback d3e37991) will ride the next daily cut once [Unreleased] is non-empty.

patch.value:
## Procedure (run after any merge to main)
1. Next day (or after the daily workflow window), check: `gh run list --workflow=auto-release` → latest run green.
2. Confirm a new tag vYYYY.M.D exists AND `npm view @unbrained/pm-cli version` advanced to match (both must hold — tagging without publish has happened).
3. If either failed: inspect the run log; known past failure modes are (a) padded-vs-unpadded month in the changelog-match step silently skipping the release (fixed 2026-05-28), (b) publish/Sentry-gate step failing post-tag (needs SENTRY auth token in release env), (c) missing issues:write permission (fixed PR#364). RELEASE_PAT is configured — auto-release is currently healthy (2026-07-04: v2026.7.4 cut).

## Why a Reminder item
The release train fails SILENTLY (empty [Unreleased] or a skipped match just means "no release"), so a standing recurring check is the only reliable detection. Keep this item OPEN permanently; log each verification as a note/comment here instead of closing.

Hardened auto-release.yml so duplicate retry detection only reads marker comments authored by github-actions[bot], and pinned that jq author filter in ci-workflow-contract.spec.ts. Validation rerun: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/ci-workflow-contract.spec.ts; pinned actionlint 1.7.12 on .github/workflows/auto-release.yml; pnpm lint; git diff --check.

value.author: codex
value.text: Review-loop evidence: accepted local Greptile finding that retry marker refusal paths should not exit as failures because that would reopen the blocker and invite another close. Updated auto-release.yml so missing issue number, unreadable retry state, and duplicate current-day marker each emit explicit retry_skip_reason outputs and exit 0 through the resolved-issue skip comment path. Docs now describe safely refused retries, and ci-workflow-contract pins retry_issue_number_unavailable, retry_state_unavailable, and retry_already_attempted. Validation rerun: focused ci-workflow-contract test, pinned actionlint 1.7.12, pnpm lint, pnpm quality:docs-links, git diff --check.
